name: Invincible
flavor: 'The famous steed of Arthas Menethil, who serves its master in life and in death. Riding him is truly a feat of strength.'
notes: This mount has a drop chance of .01%.

name: Headless Horseman's Mount
flavor: 'Be it into the flood, or into the fire, this one will go where you require.'
notes: This mount has a drop chance of .01% and is only available during the Hallow's End.

name: Azure Drake
flavor: 'Always speak politely to an enraged dragon.'
notes: Can drop simultaneously with the Blue Drake.

name: Blue Drake
flavor: 'Come not between the dragon and his wrath.'
notes: Can drop simultaneously with the Azure Drake.

name: Spectral Tiger
flavor: 'Historians claim that these incorporeal beasts were created when Draenor exploded, unleashing energies that warped the world's flora and fauna.'
notes: Only obtainable with a wow tcg card code, which are no longer in production.

name: Emerald Raptor
flavor: 'Bred from the fiercest stock anywhere and guaranteed not to bite (much).'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darkspear Trolls (or playing as a troll). Bought with 1 gold.

flavor: 'Bred from the fiercest stock anywhere and guaranteed not to bite (much).'

notes: Requires Exalted with Darkspear Trolls (or playing as a troll). Bought with 10 gold.

notes: Requires Exalted with Thunder Bluff (or playing as an tauren). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Gray Ram
flavor: 'Male rams will often smash their thick skulls against each other for hours to impress a female. In that way, they're very similar to dwarves.'

name: Striped Frostsaber
flavor: 'This hearty mount's ferocious appetite earned it the nickname 'Dragon Belly' in the night elf language.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Striped Nightsaber
flavor: 'Considered one of Azeroth's perfect predators, these agile beasts can sprint through dense forests without making a sound.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Spotted Frostsaber
flavor: 'This hearty mount's ferocious appetite earned it the nickname 'Dragon Belly' in the night elf language.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Striped Dawnsaber
flavor: 'Night elves once believed that seeing this light colored saber breed in the wild was an ill omen.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 1 gold.

name: Swift Stormsaber
flavor: 'Rumor has it that this breed was named after the renowned archdruid Malfurion Stormrage.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 10 gold.

name: Swift Frostsaber
flavor: 'Night elves raise frostsaber cubs from infancy, forging lifelong bonds of trust between rider and beast.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 10 gold.

name: Swift Mistsaber
flavor: 'Some historians claim that this breed's misty grey coat is the result of ancient Highborne experiments conducted on nightsabers.'
notes: Requires Exalted with Darnassus (or playing as a night elf). Bought with 10 gold.
